news.t: KraneShares Dragon Capital Vietnam Growth Index ETF (Ticker: KPHO) Lists on the New York Stock Exchange

holdings.infoBox: KPHO is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings.

overview.description: The KraneShares Dragon Capital Growth of Vietnam Index ETF (KPHO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large-cap Vietnam equities listed on the Ho Chi Minh Stock Exchange (HOSE). The index selects and weights securities based on fundamental criteria that focus on growth factors KPHO was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by KraneShares.
